interpretation: Negative conditional association in pooled data.
caution: Mixes cross-province and within-province variation; not a main causal estimate.

interpretation: Positive within-province association after absorbing province fixed effects.
caution: Does not absorb common year shocks.

interpretation: Negative association after absorbing year fixed effects.
caution: Does not absorb time-invariant province heterogeneity.

interpretation: Positive association after province and year fixed effects.
caution: Still a linear baseline association, not final causal proof.

interpretation: Stable negative theta across learners, seeds, and most folds.
caution: Opposite sign from TWFE; current DML has no full province FE in nuisance functions and uses row-level folds.

interpretation: CRF has not been implemented in the current repo.
caution: Do not report or interpret CRF results.
